overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The character moves from a covered area under an overpass, crosses a busy intersection, and continues past the 'TIME MACHINE' building while surrounded by holographic advertisements and futuristic vehicles.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing neon signs and futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in dark clothing

entered.detail: elevated highway overhead with metallic support beams creating partial cover
building with prominent yellow and black BD SMACK signage and neon pink accents
large floating digital advertisements with purple and pink neon colors
sleek black cars with glowing accents driving on the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. To the left, the BD SMACK building displays bright neon signage while futuristic vehicles pass by on the road. The lighting is a mix of shadow from the overpass and colorful neon illumination from surrounding advertisements.

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sunlit intersection
begins crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while navigating around other pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: art deco style building with prominent THE MACHINE neon signage and horizontal gold lighting strips
tall pole with horizontal traffic signals showing red lights
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a bright open intersection. The TIME MACHINE building becomes visible on the right with its distinctive art deco architecture and neon trim. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with art deco architecture

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and elevated highway ramps above
camera returns to forward-facing position to continue walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk while looking up at the towering architecture and elevated highways overhead

entered.detail: curved elevated roadway with yellow trim connecting to higher levels of the city
white steam or smoke rising from a vent in the street creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the TIME MACHINE building, which now dominates the right side of the frame with its glowing neon edges. The camera tilts upward to reveal the massive elevated highway ramps and towering skyscrapers above. Steam rises from a street vent in the distance, adding to the cyberpunk atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: small corner store with green roof and yellow walls displaying various goods

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the sunlit sidewalk, passing a small green-roofed corner shop on the left. The TIME MACHINE building falls behind as the character moves deeper into the commercial district, with holographic billboards lining the street and occasional pedestrians passing by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed depths of an urban overpass into a bright, neon-saturated commercial district. It begins with the character walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, where the dim light is punctuated by the vivid neon signage of the BD SMACK building. As the character emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a bright intersection where the art deco architecture of the TIME MACHINE building comes into view and the camera follows the character across a yellow-striped crosswalk. The perspective then shifts as the character passes the glowing edges of the TIME MACHINE building, with the camera tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and steam rising from street vents. Finally, the movement continues down a sunlit sidewalk past a green-roofed corner shop, leaving the landmark building behind as the view expands into a street lined with holographic billboards.
